_meta.note: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE DATA for demoing the full pipeline. Registration numbers, dates, first-aid and dosage strings are plausible placeholders, NOT authoritative. Before any real deployment these rows MUST be replaced by scripts/seed.js ingesting the official MoA Plant Health Regulatory Directorate 2022 list (~1,011 products). Nothing here may be treated as agronomic advice.
_meta.reg_no_format: ETH-<TYPE>-<SEQ>/<YY>  (TYPE: FUN fungicide, INS insecticide, HRB herbicide) — placeholder scheme, see DECISIONS.md
_meta.who_hazard_classes: Ia extremely / Ib highly / II moderately / III slightly hazardous / U unlikely acute hazard

first_aid.skin: Remove contaminated clothing. Wash skin with plenty of soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse eyes with clean running water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth, sip water, get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air and rest. Get medical help if breathing is hard.

dosages.application_notes: Apply at first sign of late blight; repeat every 7-10 days.
Preventive spray; do not exceed 3 applications per season.
For purple blotch and downy mildew.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water for 15 minutes.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. This is an organophosphate — get medical help immediately; atropine may be needed.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately. Seek medical help if symptoms appear.

dosages.application_notes: Against aphids; spray in early morning or late afternoon.
For aphids and thrips; ensure full leaf coverage.

first_aid.skin: Wash affected skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse eyes with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth and get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air. Seek medical help if unwell.

dosages.application_notes: Post-emergence against broadleaf weeds; avoid spray drift to broadleaf crops.
Apply at tillering stage; do not apply near flowering.

first_aid.skin: Wash with plenty of soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth, sip water, get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air and rest.

dosages.application_notes: Total weed control on fallow land; apply to actively growing weeds.
Directed spray between rows only; never on green stems or leaves.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing; wash skin with soap and water. Tingling of skin is usually temporary.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth and get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air. Seek medical help if breathing is affected.

dosages.application_notes: Against bollworm; rotate with a different mode of action.
For fall armyworm; direct spray into the whorl.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin thoroughly with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Organophosphate — get medical help immediately; atropine may be needed.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air at once and get medical help.

first_aid.skin: Wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth, sip water, get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air and rest.

dosages.application_notes: Systemic + contact control of late blight; apply preventively.
For downy mildew and late blight.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Organophosphate — get medical help immediately; atropine may be needed.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and seek medical help.

dosages.application_notes: Against antestia bug; spray to run-off.
For leaf miners and aphids.

first_aid.skin: Wash skin with soap and water. Facial tingling is usually temporary.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth and get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air. Seek medical help if unwell.

dosages.application_notes: Against bollworm and aphids.
For caterpillars and aphids.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Organophosphate — get medical help immediately; atropine may be needed.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and seek medical help.

dosages.application_notes: Against bollworm and whitefly.
For leaf miner; observe pre-harvest interval strictly.

first_aid.skin: Wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth, sip water, get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air and rest.

dosages.application_notes: For coffee berry disease; preventive cover spray.
For bacterial spot and early blight.

first_aid.skin: Wash skin with soap and water. Tingling is usually temporary.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth and get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air. Seek medical help if breathing is affected.

dosages.application_notes: For fall armyworm; direct into the whorl.
For caterpillars and beetles.

first_aid.skin: Wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth and get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air and rest.

dosages.application_notes: Pre- or early post-emergence for broadleaf and grass weeds.
Pre-emergence; ensure adequate soil moisture.

first_aid.skin: Wash skin with soap and water; the orange stain is harmless.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth and get medical help.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air and rest.

dosages.application_notes: Pre-emergence weed control; apply to moist soil.
Pre-emergence for annual grasses and broadleaf weeds.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Get emergency medical help immediately.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and seek medical help.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Get emergency medical help immediately.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and seek medical help.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water immediately.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Extremely toxic organophosphate — get emergency medical help NOW; atropine required.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and get emergency medical help.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Organophosphate — get medical help immediately; atropine may be needed.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and seek medical help.

dosages.application_notes: For aphids and fruit flies.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Carbamate — get emergency medical help immediately; atropine required.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and get emergency medical help.

first_aid.skin: Remove clothing and wash skin with plenty of soap and water.
first_aid.eyes: Rinse with clean water for at least 15 minutes.
first_aid.ingestion: EXTREMELY dangerous even in small amounts. Do NOT induce vomiting. Get emergency medical help IMMEDIATELY.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air immediately and get medical help.
